dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires price to open at/above central pivot (using pivot indicator), break above previous day's high (using prev_high), and confirm with larger move size (using range > ATR as proxy for significant momentum). Exit set as reversal below pivot when entry signal invalidates. Multi-day range breakout concept approximated through ATR comparison which adapts to volatility regimes.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires price to open at/above central pivot (using pivot indicator), break above previous day's high (using prev_high), and confirm with larger move size (using range > ATR as proxy for significant momentum). Exit set as reversal below pivot when entry signal invalidates. Multi-day range breakout concept approximated through ATR comparison which adapts to volatility regimes.

source_rule_text: Buy when price opens above or around the central pivot and breaks above previous day's high and range, with larger significance when breaking multi-day ranges.
